argument.script: (async () => { const res = await fetch('https://www.zhihu.com/api/v3/feed/topstory/hot-lists/total?limit=50', { credentials: 'include' }); const text = await res.text(); const d = JSON.parse(text.replace(/("id"\s*:\s*)(\d{16,})/g, '$1"$2"')); return (d?.data || []).map((item, i) => { const t = item.target || {}; const questionId = t.id == null ? '' : String(t.id); return { rank: i + 1, title: t.title, heat: item.detail_text || '', answers: t.answer_count, url: 'https://www.zhihu.com/question/' + questionId }; }).slice(0, {{ limit }}); })()
